name: Ancient Gear Golem - Ultimate Pound
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械巨人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアゴーレム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アルティメット・パウンド
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. Up to twice per turn, when this attacking card destroys a monster by battle: You can discard 1 Machine monster; this card can attack again in a row. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, add 1 other "Ancient Gear" monster from your GY to your hand.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. Up to twice per turn, when this attacking card destroys a monster by battle: You can discard 1 Machine monster; this card can attack again in a row. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, add 1 other "Ancient Gear" monster from your GY to your hand.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, add 1 other "Ancient Gear" monster from your GY to your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
